ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
Language: c%23
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for .NET. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-net.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
Language: c%23
Synchronize Codex session provider metadata across rollout files and SQLite state.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/sdk
Language: c%23
Core functionality needed to create .NET Core projects, that is shared between Visual Studio and CLI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
Language: c%23
A hex editor for WeChat/QQ/TIM - PC版微信/QQ/TIM防撤回补丁（我已经看到了，撤回也没用了）

ns0:entry.ns0:title: itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
Language: c%23
Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c%23
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
Language: c%23
Render particle effect in UnityUI(uGUI). Maskable, sortable, and no extra Camera/RenderTexture/Canvas.
